DOCUMENT:
Discharge Summary for Emily Wilson, MRN: 123456, SSN: 987-65-4321, Date of Birth: 1990-02-15. Address: 123 Main St, Phone: 555-1234. Visit Date: 2023-10-20 to 2023-10-25. The patient was admitted with a diagnosis of sepsis due to methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA). During the hospital stay, the patient was treated with vancomycin and cefepime. Lab values on admission showed WBC of 15,000 cells/μL, platelets of 200,000 cells/μL, and creatinine of 1.2 mg/dL. The patient underwent a procedure for central line placement. The patient was discharged on oral linezolid and cefixime. Follow-up appointment is scheduled for 2023-11-01.

JSON:

{"visit_date": "2023-10-20 to 2023-10-25", "diagnosis": "sepsis due to methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA)", "medications": "vancomycin and cefepime", "procedure": "central line placement", "lab_values": "WBC of 15,000 cells/μL, platelets of 200,000 cells/μL, and creatinine of 1.2 mg/dL", "patient_name": "Emily Wilson", "mrn": "123456", "ssn": "987-65-4321", "dob": "1990-02-15", "address": "123 Main St", "phone": "555-1234"}

DOCUMENT:
Progress Note for patient Emily Wilson, MRN 123456, SSN 987-65-4321, DOB 02/12/1975, seen on 2023-02-20. The patient's address is 123 Main St, Anytown, USA 12345, and phone number is 555-123-4567. Emily was diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus. Her current medications include Metformin 1000mg twice daily and Glipizide 10mg daily. Today's lab values showed a Hemoglobin A1c of 8.2%, fasting glucose of 140mg/dL, and a creatinine level of 1.1mg/dL. The procedure planned is a follow-up appointment in 3 months to monitor her diabetes control.

DOCUMENT:
Patient Name: Emily Wilson, MRN: 123456, SSN: 987-65-4321, DOB: 1990-02-12, Address: 456 Elm St, Phone: 555-1234. Visit Date: 2022-01-10. The patient is currently taking Spiriva and Advair for her chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). A chest CT was performed to evaluate symptoms of worsening shortness of breath. Lab values showed a white blood cell count of 12,000 cells/μL. The diagnosis is pneumonia, and the patient will undergo a bronchoscopy procedure. Medications will be adjusted to include antibiotics.

DOCUMENT:
Patient Name: Emily Wilson, MRN: NW12345, DOB: 1980-02-15, seen in outpatient clinic on 2024-03-10. The patient's address is 123 Main St, Anytown, USA 12345, and phone number is 555-1234. Emily is a 44-year-old female with a history of hypertension and stage 3 chronic kidney disease. Her current medications include lisinopril 20mg daily, amlodipine 5mg daily, and metformin 500mg twice daily. Today's visit was for follow-up on her kidney function and blood pressure management. Lab values from 2024-03-05 show a serum creatinine of 1.8 mg/dL and eGFR of 45 mL/min/1.73m^2. Diagnosis: Hypertension, Stage 3 Chronic Kidney Disease. Procedure: None today. The patient's SSN is not on file.

DOCUMENT:
Discharge Summary for Jane Doe, MRN: 123456, SSN: 987-65-4321, Date of Birth: 1970-02-12. Address: 123 Main St, Anytown, USA. Phone: 555-123-4567. Visit Date: 2023-02-20 to 2023-02-25. The patient was admitted with a diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction. Medications on discharge include aspirin 81mg daily, metoprolol 50mg twice daily, and atorvastatin 20mg daily. The patient underwent a procedure of coronary angiography, which showed significant stenosis in the LAD artery. Lab values on discharge were: troponin 0.05 ng/mL, creatinine 1.2 mg/dL. The patient is to follow up with cardiology in 2 weeks.

DOCUMENT:
Emergency Department Note for patient Emily Wilson, MRN 123456, SSN 987-65-4321, DOB 02/12/1965, who presented on 2023-02-20. The patient's address is 123 Main St, and phone number is 555-1234. She has a history of metastatic breast cancer and was taking tamoxifen 20mg daily and Denosumab 120mg SC monthly. Today, she complains of severe back pain and was found to have a hemoglobin of 8.5 and a calcium level of 12.2. The diagnosis is hypercalcemia of malignancy. The procedure performed was a right thoracic spine MRI, which showed multiple metastatic lesions. The patient was given IV pamidronate 90mg and morphine 4mg IV. Medications on discharge include morphine 10mg PO q4h and calcitriol 0.5mcg PO daily.

DOCUMENT:
Operative Note for John Smith, MRN: 123456, SSN: 987-65-4321, DOB: 1975-02-12, dated 2023-02-20. Preoperative diagnosis: Diverticulitis. The patient was taken to the operating room where a colonoscopy was performed. Medications on board included Aspirin 81mg daily and Metformin 500mg twice daily. Lab values showed WBC count of 12,000 cells/μL. The procedure revealed a 2cm polyp in the sigmoid colon which was removed. Postoperative diagnosis: Colonic polyp. The patient was discharged to home, address: 123 Main St, phone: 555-1234.
